Internal Deal Memo

Project Codename: Operation Sapphire

Overview: We are in the advanced stages of negotiating the acquisition of Quantum Dynamics Pte Ltd, a strategic move to enhance our technological capabilities in the AI sector. The proposed acquisition value is SGD 85,000,000.

Key Contact: Dr. Marcus Lim, Head of Mergers & Acquisitions
NRIC: S8765432B
Email: marcus.lim@futuresg.sg
Phone: +65 6123 4567

Target Company UEN: 198765432W

Please review the attached preliminary due diligence report and financial projections. All communications regarding this acquisition should remain confidential until public announcement. Further updates will be provided in the upcoming strategy meeting scheduled for next week. 

Best regards,
Ms. Elaine Chong
Senior Analyst
